title: Masterplast Invisible Assorted Aqua Plasters, Flexible, Durable, (Pack Of 24), Clear
features: ULTRA WATERPROOF: Masterplast Invisible Aqua Plasters are ultra waterproof making them the ideal dressings for use in and around water. Total protection in the shower, whilst washing and swimming.
PROTECT: Each plaster air permeable allowing the wound to breathe, aiding the healing process, whilst being protected from water and other liquids.
INVISIBLE & ABSORBENT: Clear material protective waterproof top layer with an absorbent wound pad to protect from infection
STERILE: Individually wrapped for safety, two sizes to suit a variety of cuts and grazes. Plasters sizes 7.6cm x 1.9cm and 3.8cm x 3.8cm, box contains 12 of each size
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Box of 24 Plasters
description: Product Description These Masterplast Invisible Aqua Plasters are the ideal dressing for use in and around water. Ideal protection in the shower, whilst washing and swimming. The non-stick pad prevents adhesion to the wound and helps to promote faster healing. Box of 12 Each 7.6cm x 1.9cm and 3.8cm x 3.8cm plasters Directions 1. Clean the wound gently before applying plaster. 2. Remove plaster from its packaging. 3. Place on wound, ensuring it adheres well to skin. 4. Change regularly or when becomes wet dirty. 5. Dispose of used plasters properly. Manufacturer Contact Information 151 Products Limited, The Old School House, 39 Bengal Street, Manchester, M4 6AF, UK. See more
